title: [MTR4] Eurotram - Strasbourg (Normal/Pride Livery)
description: Strasbourg's EuroTram as a working train to MTR4. It features both the CTS livery and a custom pride livery!
body:
This resourcepack adds the **original Socimi EuroTram** to MTR, which was made by me in Blender, on its original **CTS / Compagnie des Transports Strasbourgeois** livery, as well as a special pride livery created by @generatio! Strasbourg's EuroTram fleet was the first order of its kind, being built by Socimi prior to its acquisition by Bombardier. CTS ordered both 8-axled and 10-axled models between 1994 and 2000, totalling 53 vehicles of this kind on their fleet. Thanks to MTR4, you're able to fully customize the consist of your train. Here are the recommended consists for this pack: - **8-axle train** - Cab (Foward) + Carriage (Normal) + Carriage (Panto) + Carriage (Normal) + Carriage (Small) + Carriage (Normal) + Cab (Backwards) - **10-axle train** - Cab (Foward) + Carriage (Normal) + Carriage (Panto) + Carriage (Normal) + Carriage (Small) + Carriage (Normal) + Carriage (Small) + Carriage (Normal) + Cab (Backward) - **Pride train** - Should be the same setup as the 8-axle train, but with the PRIDE variants.
This model used, as a basis, my EuroTram Metro do Porto model. Hope that you guys enjoy it and enjoy the special livery that comes with this pack (I believe that this would be the first pride livery in MTR?) If you have any issues, questions about the pack or suggestions for future projects, feel free to join the discord linked below :D

**Note:** This project is NOT affiliated with, and is not an official product of Compagnie des Transports Strasbourgeois.
